changes.citation: automation_bus/latest_cursor_prompt.md:1-7 — all five required fields present: work_id=DOMAIN-LABEL1, branch=domain-ux/domain-label1-governed-biomarker-display-labels, risk_level=HIGH, execution_model=TWO_PHASE_START_FINISH, change_type=MIXED

docs/planning-papers/DOMAIN_UX_health_systems_card_scaffold_sprint_plan_FINAL.md — confirmed on disk; docs/audit-papers/DOMAIN-UX1C_governed_subsystem_evidence_model_notes.md — confirmed on disk; docs/audit-papers/DOMAIN-UX1D_full_wave1_expanded_health_systems_card_notes.md — confirmed on disk; docs/governance/AUTOMATION_BUS_SOP_v1.3.1.md — confirmed on disk. NOTE: docs/discussion documents/healthiq_health_systems_card_discussion_FINAL.md — path contains a space; not glob-verifiable; Cursor must confirm it can be read at preflight.

frontend/app/components/results/Wave1SubsystemEvidenceSection.tsx:49,64 — both included and missing marker rendering call wave1ConfidenceMarkerDisplayLabel(markerId); frontend/app/lib/wave1ConfidenceMarkerLabels.ts:5-16 — CANONICAL_ID_TO_LABEL contains only 10 liver-domain entries; wave1ConfidenceMarkerLabels.ts:24-28 — fallback returns raw lowercase string for single-word ids (hba1c, crp, glucose, insulin, homocysteine) and title-case-split for multi-word ids (Ldl Cholesterol, Hdl Cholesterol, Tc Hdl Ratio)

backend/core/models/results.py:177-182 — SubsystemEvidenceV1.included_marker_ids: List[str] (default_factory=list), missing_marker_ids: List[str] (default_factory=list); frontend/app/types/analysis.ts:303-304 — same shape. No label-bearing objects exist in current DTO contract.

backend/ssot/biomarkers.yaml — grep for consumer_display_name, display_label, display_name returned no matches. All Wave 1 marker entries confirmed present (total_cholesterol, ldl_cholesterol, hdl_cholesterol, triglycerides, tc_hdl_ratio:line 92, apob:line 170, apoa1:line 189, lipoprotein_a:line 1626, homocysteine:line 1644, insulin:line 249, alt, ast, ggt, alp, albumin, bilirubin — confirmed). consumer_display_name field does not yet exist and must be added.

backend/core/models/biomarker.py:12 — ConfigDict(frozen=True, extra='forbid'). BiomarkerDefinition fields at lines 14-19: name, aliases, unit, description, category, data_type only. consumer_display_name is absent. Adding to YAML alone is insufficient — the Pydantic model and resolver extraction must also be updated.

backend/core/canonical/resolver.py:50-57 — load_biomarkers() extracts only name, aliases, unit, description, category, data_type. consumer_display_name extraction must be added here alongside the YAML and BiomarkerDefinition model changes.

backend/core/analytics/wave1_subsystem_evidence.py:1-13 — imports: __future__, dataclasses, typing, core.models.results. No import of CanonicalResolver or any SSOT loader. Wiring the assembler to the SSOT is a new dependency that must be introduced without touching scoring or signal logic.

Display label chain spans six layers that must all be updated atomically: backend/ssot/biomarkers.yaml (add consumer_display_name) → backend/core/models/biomarker.py:9-19 (add field) → backend/core/canonical/resolver.py:50-57 (extract field) → backend/core/analytics/wave1_subsystem_evidence.py (wire resolver, emit label objects) → backend/core/models/results.py:167-196 (add included_markers/missing_markers fields to SubsystemEvidenceV1) → frontend/app/types/analysis.ts:300-308 (extend interface) → frontend/app/components/results/Wave1SubsystemEvidenceSection.tsx:49,64 (render backend-supplied labels). A partial update degrades silently to poor labels with no error.

Prompt §E lists apob, apoa1, lipoprotein_a, hs_crp as required coverage. None of these appear in any expected_marker_ids tuple in backend/core/analytics/wave1_subsystem_evidence.py:25-78. Labels for these IDs cannot be emitted through the subsystem evidence DTO without adding new subsystem definitions — which would be a behaviour change requiring explicit declaration. Cursor must scope to existing assembler marker mappings only unless GPT explicitly approves new subsystem additions.

backend/core/models/results.py:173 — SubsystemEvidenceV1 uses ConfigDict(frozen=True, extra='forbid'). Adding included_markers / missing_markers as new optional fields requires explicit field declarations with defaults; they cannot be passed as extra kwargs. Backward compatibility maintained if new fields have default=None.

backend/tests/regression/test_domain_ux1c_governed_subsystem_evidence.py — confirmed on disk. Must be updated to assert new DTO fields (included_markers / missing_markers with display_label). All other validation test files named in prompt §Required validation commands confirmed present.

Prompt §Forbidden — backend/core/scoring/**, backend/core/pipeline/**, root_cause*, report_compiler*, narrative_report_compiler*, knowledge_bus/**, automation_bus/state/*, run_work_package.py, golden_gate_local.py, update_cursor_status.py. None required by the display-label implementation direction. No Intelligence Core analytical logic changes needed.

automation_bus/latest_cursor_prompt.md:97-100 — STOP if token missing or work_id/branch mismatch; latest_cursor_prompt.md:116 — STOP before implementation until authority choice is explicit in notes. STOP conditions are unambiguous and PowerShell-compatible.
